title: GEOG 203 Syllabus — Spring 2022
html:
Course syllabus for Human-Environment Geography (GEOG 203) at osu, Spring 2022, taught by Demian Hommel. Baccalaureate Core "Difference, Power and Discrimination" requirement. The HEG term project (Story Map) is 50% of the grade. Frame: how political/economic power produces unequal exposure to environmental hazards — political ecology, environmental justice, the population-consumption-technology nexus.

TL;DR

  • osu GEOG 203 / geog 203 — Spring 2022 syllabus, Demian Hommel teaching.
  • DPD-category course: how unequal power produces unequal vulnerability to climate, hazards, food insecurity.
  • Term project = HEG Issue Story Map (50% of grade) — Yahir picks an issue, researches, builds digital story-telling artifact.
  • Companion to Iron Ox sustainability critique — same semester, same lens.
  • Reading list anchored in Moseley, Perramond, Hapke, Laris textbook + Top Hat in-class polling.

osu · geog 203 · sustainability triple bottom line · climate change
